case_title: CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION VS. COUNTY & CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT COUNTY & CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SUMMONS ISSUED ON COMPLAINT TO PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION A PUBLIC ENTITY
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR AUG-04-2003 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. NOTICE OF MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON JUL-17-2003 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 622. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DECLARATORY RELIEF, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION A PUBLIC ENTITY AS TO DEFENDANT COUNTY & CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO ALL PERSONS UNKNOWN CLAIMING ANY LEGAL OR EQUITABLE RIGHT TITLE ESTATE LIEN OR INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY ADVERSE TO PLAINTIFF'S TITLE OR ANY CLOUD ON PLAINTIFF'S TITLE TO THE PROPERTY DOES 1 TO 100 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-31-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-04-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-16-2003
NOTICE OF OBJECTION AND OBJECTION TO SHORT CAUSE TRIAL;
MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-04-2003 VACATED. DISMISSAL FILED 5-15-03.

REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-17-2003 - DISMISSAL FILED 5-15-03.
JOINDER OF DEFT TO PLAINTIFFS OBJECTION TO SHORT CAUSE TRIAL ON APRIL 21,2003 FILED BY DEFENDANT COUNTY & CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
